description: Provision Postgres databases + webhooks from AI coding agents in one HTTP call.

name: io.github.InstaNode-dev/mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer JWT for paid-tier callers. Mint at https://instanode.dev/dashboard → 'API token for CLI / agent'. Lifts the free-tier 5-per-subnet-per-day provisioning cap and auto-links new resources to your account. Leave unset to use the free tier anonymously.
environmentVariables.name: INSTANODE_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.instanode.dev. Useful for self-hosted deployments.
environmentVariables.name: INSTANODE_API_BASE
